RetroPP.title: Retro Post Process Material
RetroPP.description:
This is a post-process material used to apply a screen-wide distortion effect that imitates graphics of earlier console generations.

This material generates a retro-style screen-space UV distortion by using world-aligned screen coordinates to sample a noise texture, remapping its unsigned color values to a signed [-1, 1] range via vector arithmetic and scaling the resulting offset with a scalar parameter to dynamically displace the final SceneTexture:PostProcessInput0 UV lookup.

The texture intensity is freely adjustable.
